violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. - Several containers in freezer & reach-in coolers need to be labeled. - Burritoes in hot-hold unit were not labeled.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. - Several containers in freezer & reach-in coolers were covered with foil. Covers need to be inpervious & nonabsorbent.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Front doors & side panels of kitchen equipment in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors throughout kitchen in need of thorough cleaning including under equipment and along edges of walls.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. - Box of buns on floor in kitchen. Needs to be stored 6 inches above floor to protect from contamination.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. - All cooling equipment (prep table, freezers, coolers) in need of cleaning. Food crumbs accumulating under shelves and edges. - Microwave in need of cleaning.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. - Vents under hood in need of cleaning. Around fryer especially.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Only handwashing sink in kitchen was covered by a tray and other dishwasher items. Not accessible or convenient to use.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. - Soap dispenser above handwashing sink was empty.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floors throughout kitchen in need of thorough cleaning including under equipment along edges of walls.
Lighting. — --- Lights/shields in kitchen needs cleaning from insects.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. - Mop was sitting in bucket with dirty water. Mops need to be hung when not in use for air-drying.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
